overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima featuring a samurai riding a horse through the Onyu Pass. The clip shows continuous traversal along mountain trails transitioning from dense forest to open meadows, with dramatic natural lighting and detailed vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded forest trail with rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: riding a horse at steady pace along a narrow forest trail, navigating between trees and rocks

entered.detail: narrow dirt path winding through dense forest
simple wooden post fence running alongside the trail
large moss-covered boulders lining the path edge
tall evergreen trees forming dense forest canopy

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow dirt trail cutting through dense forest. The rider moves steadily forward along the shaded path, passing wooden fences on the left and large rocky outcrops on the right. Dappled sunlight filters through the pine canopy overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain pass meadow with panoramic views

events.description: trail emerges from dense forest into wide open mountain pass with distant mountain views

agents.ego_description: galloping through open mountain meadow at increased speed

entered.detail: hazy blue mountain peaks visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The forest opens dramatically into a wide mountain pass. The trail widens as the rider gallops through sunlit meadows, with distant mountain peaks visible ahead. The rocky terrain recedes into the background as the landscape becomes more open and airy.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense bamboo and pine forest trail

events.description: path enters denser woodland with bamboo groves and larger trees

agents.ego_description: navigating winding trail through dense forest with bamboo groves

entered.detail: tall bamboo stalks clustering along the trail edge
massive old-growth trees with thick trunks

segments.scene_description: The trail curves and descends into a denser forest section characterized by bamboo groves and massive ancient trees. The lighting becomes more diffused as the canopy closes overhead, creating a more enclosed and intimate atmosphere compared to the open pass.

scene_state.functional_zone: open hillside trail with valley views

events.description: forest opens to wide hillside with panoramic valley views

agents.ego_description: riding along open hillside trail with expansive views

entered.detail: rolling grassy hills stretching into the distance
sweeping vista of the valley below with distant terrain

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens onto a wide hillside trail with expansive views of the valley below. The dense forest gives way to rolling grasslands and scattered rocks. The rider continues along the elevated path with open sky above and panoramic vistas of the distant landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a mountain pass that alternates between enclosed forest canopies and expansive, sunlit vistas. It begins on a narrow dirt trail shaded by a pine canopy, where the rider passes wooden fences and rocky outcrops under dappled sunlight. As the forest opens dramatically, the trail widens into a bright mountain pass where the rider gallops through airy meadows toward distant peaks. The scene then shifts as the path curves and descends back into a dense woodland of bamboo groves and ancient trees, causing the light to become diffused and the atmosphere more intimate. Finally, the dense foliage gives way to a wide hillside trail, opening onto rolling grasslands with panoramic views of the valley below under an open sky.
